message:
fix(viewer): add placement_id to prevent Kitty graphics accumulation

Without a fixed placement_id, each frame created a NEW placement of the
same image, causing Ghostty to accumulate textures in VRAM. This led to
texture thrashing where ghostty_surface_draw degraded from 2ms to 500ms+
as VRAM filled up and macOS started swapping.

Using both fixed image_id=100 AND placement_id=100 tells Kitty protocol
to replace the existing placement instead of accumulating new ones.
